boundary: Vendored at vendor/capcut-cli. Called only via spawnSync from packages/capcut-agent. Zero runtime npm dependencies. No account-facing automation.

reason: The vendor/ directory is a container for explicitly approved external repos. Each sub-repo must have its own vendor-allowed decision.
